characters.name: Blitz
characters.description: Blitz Blitz(voiced byJeff Bennett)[1]is a Doberman from Germany. Prior to joining theRoad Rovers, Blitz was an attack dog for an auto repair shop, attacking carjackers. His razor sharp teeth and claws can cut through anything. Blitz is a hefty Doberman with huge muscles, massive muscular build, brown and tan fur and red eyes. He is wearing a silver and blue suit with an orange collar and belt with the yellow Road Rovers logo. Blitz is a team player but shows no proper respect to anyone but himself. Blitz's arrogance is immediately apparent upon being transdogmafied, as he compliments his own appearance and kisses the muscles on his arms.[2] He has romantic feelings for Colleen, often met only with indifference, often followed in short order by physical violence on her part, which is clearly out of spite. Sometimes he deserves it, and sometimes he doesn't. But abusing him was a running gag in the show. Blitz often states a desire to bite the behinds of his enemies. He can be a bit aggressive and stubborn at times, but yet he stays with the team despite how much of a burden he is to them, or how abusive they can be towards him. Sometimes Blitz can be a bit of a chicken when it comes to scary situations. He has a heart of gold and is a good guy and friend at heart.

characters.name: Colleen
characters.description: Colleen Colleen (voiced byTress MacNeille)[1]is the martial arts expert, and the second in command of the team. She is from England. She is a Border Collie and owned by the Prime Minister of the United Kingdom. Before joining theRoad Rovers, Colleen was a stray who fought other stray dogs for food. Colleen is known for being cheerful with a rapier wit, and she is also calm under pressure. She has a lively sense of humor, and is quite close to most of her teammates, with the exception of Blitz, whom she finds annoying with his immature behaviour. Colleen sometimes shows no care or concern for Blitz, and often enjoys pretending to forget who he is along with his very existence. However, she has romantic feelings towards Hunter, and it was hinted many times throughout the series that they had something going for each other. Colleen is known for being cheerful with a rapier wit, and she is also calm under pressure. She has a lively sense of humor, and is quite close to most of her teammates, with the exception of Blitz, whom she finds annoying with his immature behaviour. Colleen sometimes shows no care or concern for Blitz, and often enjoys pretending to forget who he is along with his very existence. However, she has romantic feelings towards Hunter, and it was hinted many times throughout the series that they had something going for each other. She is also known as helpful, smart, brave, beautiful, agile, skilled, quick-witted, calm under pressure, a lively sense of humor, cheerful, polite, and cunning. She is very friendly

characters.name: Exile
characters.description: Exile Exilo Michalovitch Sanhusky, orExile(voiced byKevin Michael Richardson),[1]is from Russia. Formerly a casual Siberian Husky pulling a dog sled, he was called by the Master and became aRoad Rover. He was notably the first dog chosen byProfessor William F. Shepardto become a Road Rover. Exile is a loyal and devoted teammate and does not question his position. He respects Hunter's rank as the leader of the team, and he loves his teammates as family, with the exception ofBlitz. Exile is a loyal and devoted teammate and does not question his position. He respects Hunter's rank as the leader of the team, and he loves his teammates as family, with the exception ofBlitz. While Exile is mostly warm hearted and gets along well with most of the team, he sharesColleen's hatred for Blitz. He constantly calls Blitz a "Weird Boy" and messes up many common sayings. However, he shows to care for Blitz as a friend. His powers include super strength, heat vision, and freeze vision. Exile did not know he had the latter ability until using it in the Rovers' first mission.[2]Exile often spoke with a deep Russian accent, and he was also the team's mechanic.

characters.name: General Parvo
characters.description: General Parvo(voiced byJim Cummings) is the main antagonist of theRoad Roversseries. He is out to destroyProfessor William F. Shepardand conquer the world. He has a permanent cough. Similar to Shepherd, Parvo has a secret hideout of his own, where he employs TheGroomeras his assistant. Parvo had tricked Shepherd into giving him the technology to create mutated dogs, and laced a dog cage with dynamite, causing theShepherd Research Laboratoryto explode. Parvo was stunned upon discovering Shepherd survived the explosion in "Let's Hit the Road." It was revealed later in the series that General Parvo was at one time a cat before being transformed into a "Feline Sapien", which resemble humans a great deal more than Shepherd's Cano-sapiens. Also it's shown that his persistent cough is due to hairballs.

characters.name: Hunter
characters.description: Hunter Hunter(voiced byJess Harnell)[1]is the main protagonist of Road Rovers. He is the leader of theRoad Rovers. He is a Golden Retriever from the United States of America. He lives with the U.S. President, who wasBill Clintonwhen the series was on the air. His power is superspeed. He lists other "superpowers" like super luck, super trust and super loyalty, which are more of traits than they are superpowers. How his power of superspeed works is Hunter runs at a fast rate, leaving a trail of fire behind. He andColleenhave romantic feelings for each other. Hunter values most members of his team, mostlyBlitz, who he (much like the rest of the team) despises for his flaws. Hunter is usually the most calm, level-headed, and easy-going of the team, as such is indicated by his mostly tranquil and happy-go-lucky personality. But while he doesn't share the passionate hatred for Blitz that Colleen andExilehave for him, he doesn't really care that much for Blitz's problems. But he still gets along with him very well. And yet, Hunter goes out of his way to save Blitz despite how much of a burden he is to the team. This shows that Hunter and Blitz are friends. Hunter usually gets most of the action. And as such, he often overshadows the rest of the team. He is known as leaderly, effective, devoted, optimistic, loyal, overly cocky, kind-hearted, protective, brave, heroic, oblivious (sometimes), flexible, forgivable, friendly, peaceful, humorous, and funny. Appearance: In contrast Exile and Blitz Hunter has slim body. He has light fur, brown eyes and long tail. He able to understand Muzzle andShag'sdog language

characters.name: Muzzle
characters.description: Muzzle ScoutakaMuzzle(voiced byFrank Welker) is a best friend ofHunter. He is a Rottweiler/Labrador Retriever mix and was the Sixth Ranger of the Road Rovers Five Man Band. He can be laid back at times, but when duty calls, he is ready to do his trusted job. Muzzle is very shy but he is also kind, sweet, lovable, cute, curious, adorable, faithful and loyal. Despite his shyness, he does, however, have a tough side whenever he or the team is insulted. Whenever he’s called into action, however, he is known for being excruciatingly violent and vicious (always off-screen) to the point that even his allies tend to be put off by such extreme levels of violence. He easily gets irritated byBlitz, but Hunter is usually able to calm him down. Muzzle is very shy but he is also kind, sweet, lovable, cute, curious, adorable, faithful and loyal. Despite his shyness, he does, however, have a tough side whenever he or the team is insulted. Whenever he’s called into action, however, he is known for being excruciatingly violent and vicious (always off-screen) to the point that even his allies tend to be put off by such extreme levels of violence. He easily gets irritated byBlitz, but Hunter is usually able to calm him down.

characters.name: Professor Hubert
characters.description: Professor Hubert(voiced byDavid Doyle) is the scientist of the Road Rovers.

characters.name: Professor William F. Shepherd
characters.description: Professor William F. Shepherd, more commonly referred to asThe Master, is theRoad Roversmaster.  He transformed them from ordinary dogs into Cano Sapiens after he built a newShepherd Research Laboratoryto help perfect and expand his research on anthropomorphication of animals. Shepherd before the explosion. As recounted in "Let's Hit the Road," Shepherd struck a deal withGeneral Parvo: Shepherd would give the blueprints and prototype for the molecular stabilizer to Parvo, in exchange for Shepherd's dog Scout, whom Parvo was carrying in a dog cage.

characters.name: Shag
characters.description: Shag Shag(voiced byFrank Welker) is an Old English Sheepdog from Switzerland. Shag is a kind of fluke as far as the transdogmafier process goes. Instead of becoming a complete cano-sapien, he is stuck at someplace in between. He can understand English and often wields weaponry, most often a bazooka which he invariably aims the wrong way. He is a coward and his fur also has seemingly unlimited storage capacity which has on various occasions housed food, articles of furniture (some bigger than himself), and fellow Road Rovers. coming soon. coming soon. Physical
